name: Category 5 Pickleball
description: Category 5 Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Mandeville, LA. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and food. The courts can be reserved.

name: Cross Gates Family Fitness
description: Come play pickleball at Cross Gates Family Fitness in Slidell, LA! There are 12 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Fritchie Park
description: Fritchie Park is a place to play pickleball in Slidell, LA. There are 8 indoor acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

description: John Slidell Park is a place to play pickleball in Slidell, LA. There are 15 courts. 12 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
